name: ClawARR Suite
description: Unified control surface for self-hosted media stacks (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Plex, Tautulli, SABnzbd, and 10+ companion services). Read-only analytics, library management, request handling, and download monitoring. Destructive actions (delete/remove) require explicit user invocation.

optionalBins.reason: percentage and GB math in analytics/library scripts
text processing in setup and config scripts
companion service management (Kometa, Recyclarr, Unpackerr); only used if RECYCLARR_SSH / KOMETA_SSH / UNPACKERR_SSH env vars are set
remote container access on NAS/Docker hosts; only invoked when *_SSH env vars are set

env.description: Primary host IP/hostname for *arr services (default: 192.168.1.100)
Sonarr API key — needed for TV library operations
Radarr API key — needed for movie library operations
Lidarr API key — needed for music library operations
Readarr API key — needed for book library operations
Prowlarr API key — needed for indexer management
Bazarr API key — needed for subtitle management
Overseerr API key — needed for request management
Plex authentication token — needed for Plex library and streaming analytics
Tautulli API key — needed for viewing analytics
SABnzbd API key — needed for download client management
Notifiarr API key — needed for notification management
Trakt.tv OAuth client ID — needed for Trakt integration
Trakt.tv OAuth client secret — needed for Trakt integration
Simkl OAuth client ID — needed for Simkl integration
Simkl OAuth client secret — needed for Simkl integration
Letterboxd API key — optional; CSV export path works without it
SSH host alias for Recyclarr container access; triggers ssh/docker usage
SSH host alias for Kometa container access; triggers ssh/docker usage
SSH host alias for Unpackerr container access; triggers ssh/docker usage
Docker config root path (default: /volume1/docker for Synology; /opt/docker otherwise)
Kometa container name (default: kometa)
Docker command for Kometa (default: docker)
Recyclarr container name (default: recyclarr)
Docker command for Recyclarr (default: docker)
Unpackerr container name (default: unpackerr)
Docker command for Unpackerr (default: docker)
Path to Trakt OAuth token cache (default: ~/.config/clawarr/trakt_tokens.json)
Path to Simkl OAuth token cache (default: ~/.config/clawarr/simkl_tokens.json)
Sonarr port (default: 8989)
Radarr port (default: 7878)
Lidarr port (default: 8686)
Readarr port (default: 8787)
Prowlarr port (default: 9696)
Bazarr port (default: 6767)
Overseerr port (default: 5055)
Plex port (default: 32400)
Tautulli port (default: 8181)
SABnzbd port (default: 8080)
FlareSolverr port (default: 8191)
Maintainerr port (default: 6246)
Notifiarr port (default: 5454)
Homarr port (default: 7575)

externalHosts: api.trakt.tv — Trakt.tv OAuth and watch history sync (only when Trakt env vars are set)
api.simkl.com — Simkl OAuth and history sync (only when Simkl env vars are set)
letterboxd.com — Letterboxd public profile reads; no write API
raw.githubusercontent.com / TRaSH-Guides — Recyclarr profile downloads (only when recyclarr.sh sync is run)
security.secretsPolicy: API keys sourced from environment variables only; never hardcoded; tokens saved locally to ~/.config/clawarr/ with 600 permissions
security.destructiveActions: None by default. Delete/remove operations (manage.sh remove, maintainerr.sh run, Radarr/Sonarr delete APIs) require explicit user invocation and are never triggered automatically.
security.dockerSshScope: docker and ssh are only invoked for companion service observability (status, logs, restart) when the corresponding *_SSH env variables are set by the user. Scripts do not scan for containers or discover hosts autonomously.
